settings.text: Inkwell started as a single chair in a shared space. Today we're a dedicated studio with three artists, but the mission hasn't changed: every tattoo should be a one-of-a-kind piece of art. We don't do flash walls or walk-in specials. We do consultations, custom designs, and work we're proud to sign.

settings.name: Alex Reyes
settings.bio: 12 years of experience. Trained under traditional Japanese masters in Osaka. Specializes in large-scale compositions and bold black ink.

settings.name: Jordan Kimura
settings.bio: Known for intricate botanical work and delicate single-needle pieces. Brings a fine art background to every design.

settings.name: Nico Stavros
settings.bio: Photorealism specialist with an eye for color theory. Former painter turned tattoo artist. Known for lifelike portraits.

settings.title: Artistry First
settings.description: Every tattoo is a custom piece designed specifically for you. No flash, no copies, no shortcuts.

settings.title: Clean & Safe
settings.description: Hospital-grade sterilization, single-use needles, and licensed artists. Your safety is non-negotiable.

settings.title: Your Vision
settings.description: We listen first, design second. The consultation process ensures the final piece is exactly what you imagined.

settings.question: Do you accept walk-ins?
settings.answer: We're an appointment-only studio. This lets us give every client the time and attention their piece deserves. Book a free consultation to get started.

settings.question: What's the minimum age for a tattoo?
settings.answer: You must be 18 or older with valid government-issued photo ID. We do not tattoo minors under any circumstances, even with parental consent.

settings.question: Do you require a deposit?
settings.answer: Yes. A non-refundable deposit is required to secure your appointment. The deposit amount varies by project size and is applied toward the final cost of your tattoo.

settings.question: Can I see my design before the appointment?
settings.answer: We share the custom design with you before your session so there's time for revisions. We want you to be completely confident in the design before any ink hits skin.
